arts.ttl: Chelsea suffer major injury blow during Conference League tie vs Copenhagen
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca started the Frenchman at left-back with captain Reece James in midfield and Trevoh Chalobah at right-back, but the Blues head coach was forced to make a change. Marc Cucurella swiftly came on in his place with a new Chelsea defensive injury arriving just as Benoit Badiashile returned to action.

arts.ttl: ‘Promise without a pay off’ – Manager needs to work out Chelsea man if summer deal is to happen
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund’s desire to buy Carney Chukwuemeka from Chelsea in the summer will depend on manager Niko Kovac working out how to get the best out of him. That’s at least Sky Germany is anything to go by, with them covering four problems that Kovac needs to fix before the end of the season. arts.sum: At the age of 17 years and 137 days, the wonderkid's appearance did not create any surprise as the Blues suffer multiple injuries in the No 9 position.
